title: From The Dark
description: A Mod that allows you to play in a mode similar to a scary mode, in a dark mode full of mystery, with powerful armor and tools that help you defeat those who rule the darkness
body:
**From The Dark**

This Mod Was Made For The **Players** Who Want More Challenges And Harder Things

This Mod adds New **Powerful** Gear And Tools And Offhand Items And Powers To Help The **Player** To Kill The Dark King.

Items In The Mod:
1. Dark Loot
2. Light Loot
3. Dark Dimension
4. Bosses

Reworking On The Mod
